title: lantana camara f. rubra
intro: Lantana camara f. rubra, also known as the red button lantana, is a variety of the invasive Lantana camara plant native to the Americas. This plant is known for its bright red flowers and is used in various herbal remedies due to its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lantana camara f. rubra include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to note that proper identification and dosing are crucial when using this plant for medicinal purposes.
